title: Cash flows through me in abundance
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for normalising large, steady cashflow as an everyday reality.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 39 of the MONEY program. For when the idea of abundant cashflow still feels theoretical rather than real.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 39 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Anchor belief in massive cashflow."

practice.whenToUse: Use on any morning when you want to anchor the felt sense of large, constant cashflow before the day starts.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 39 of the MONEY program. The language is movement-focused: cash flows, not arrives occasionally.
Cash flows through me in abundance. Large inflows are normal and safe. I am a channel for massive, steady cashflow.
Say it three times in the morning. On the third pass, name a specific figure — the monthly cashflow you are anchoring belief in.
Adapted from Day 39 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
